dataset: Library of Congress Works Progress Administration (WPA) Posters Collection

pi_items.source: Library of Congress official collection page: https://www.loc.gov/collections/works-progress-administration-posters/about-this-collection/

pi_items.verified_value: 907 posters in Library of Congress; approximately 2,000 known to exist overall
pi_items.source: Library of Congress WPA Posters collection page and multiple LOC sources

pi_items.verified_value: 31 KB (medium) and 145 KB (large) for most posters, well above the 50 KB minimum requirement
pi_items.source: Library of Congress poster items: https://www.loc.gov/pictures/item/98518589/ (See America. Visit the national parks)

pi_items.verified_value: true - Multiple examples verified including: 'See America. Visit the national parks' (1936-1940), 'The national parks preserve wild life' (1936-1939), 'Grand Canyon National Park, a free government service' (c. 1938), 'Yellowstone National Park, Ranger Naturalist Service' (c. 1938), 'Zion National Park, Ranger Naturalist Service', and 'Lassen Volcanic National Park, Ranger Naturalist Service'
pi_items.source: Library of Congress Prints & Photographs Online Catalog and search results: https://www.loc.gov/pictures/search/?q=wpa+national+park+poster

pi_items.verified_value: true - Collection includes 1,172 subject classifications including Travel, National Parks, and Tourism
true - Both JPEG and TIFF formats are available for download
pi_items.source: Library of Congress content statement: 'All jpegs/tiffs display outside Library of Congress' and multiple item pages showing JPEG download options

pi_items.verified_value: Predominantly silkscreen, lithograph, and woodcut prints
pi_items.source: Library of Congress WPA collection about page: https://www.loc.gov/pictures/collection/wpapos/

pi_items.verified_value: true - Large resolution JPEG files (1024px and larger) are available for download, meeting or exceeding typical 'highest resolution' expectations
pi_items.source: Verified through poster items at LOC: https://www.loc.gov/item/98518597/

privileged_info_summary: The Library of Congress (loc.gov) maintains a collection of 907 WPA posters produced from 1936 to 1943. Multiple Travel and National Parks posters are available and searchable by subject, including 'See America. Visit the national parks,' 'The national parks preserve wild life,' 'Grand Canyon National Park,' and 'Yellowstone National Park.' High-resolution JPEG and TIFF formats are available for download, with JPEG files typically available at 31 KB and 145 KB sizes, both supporting the minimum 50 KB file size requirement. However, the task description incorrectly states the posters are from the '1930s-1950s' when they were actually produced 1936-1943 exclusively.
